## Problem

What practical problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Why It Belongs In Core

Explain why this should be part of the core runtime instead of a host-specific integration.

## Additional Context

Include examples, traces, or competing approaches if useful.
